members.failure_reason: cluster J failed: active_evidence has only 0 item(s); cluster J requires ≥2 independent post-old-state evidence items per protocol §10.4. Likely the extractor returned an empty list (deliberate 'cannot comply' signal) or the realized history doesn't carry enough behavioral evidence.
